title: Beacon Hill Leisure overhead line (EME335), S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  21 October 2025  Location   Beacon Hill LeisureUpton Heath / Dorset HeathDorsetEngland   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line.
